title: QA_NUCLEAR_MAGIC_ORBIT_CERT.v1
primary_source: Mayer, M. G. (1949). On Closed Shells in Nuclei. Physical Review, 75(12), 1969-1970. DOI: 10.1103/PhysRev.75.1969. Haxel, O., Jensen, J. H. D., & Suess, H. E. (1949). On the Magic Numbers in Nuclear Structure. Physical Review, 75(11), 1766. DOI: 10.1103/PhysRev.75.1766.2.
description: Fixture schema for QA Nuclear Magic Orbit Cert [280]. Each fixture identifies one or more nuclear magic numbers and their expected orbit counts under mod-9 route enumeration.
